general.name: Jamf Connect Login SCS
general.payloads: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><!DOCTYPE plist PUBLIC "-//Apple//DTD PLIST 1.0//EN" "http://www.apple.com/DTDs/PropertyList-1.0.dtd"> <plist version="1"><dict><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>97A79578-17D1-46EB-8CAF-1790B766A128</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>Configuration</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>Saks</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>97A79578-17D1-46EB-8CAF-1790B766A128</string><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Jamf Connect Login SCS</string><key>PayloadDescription</key><string>Jamf Connect Login Settings</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadEnabled</key><true/><key>PayloadRemovalDisallowed</key><true/><key>PayloadScope</key><string>System</string><key>PayloadContent</key><array><dict><key>PayloadDisplayName</key><string>Custom Settings</string><key>PayloadIdentifier</key><string>7CB8244A-6663-4770-A257-AAC2567C015E</string><key>PayloadOrganization</key><string>JAMF Software</string><key>PayloadType</key><string>com.apple.ManagedClient.preferences</string><key>PayloadUUID</key><string>7CB8244A-6663-4770-A257-AAC2567C015E</string><key>PayloadVersion</key><integer>1</integer><key>PayloadContent</key><dict><key>com.jamf.connect.login</key><dict><key>Forced</key><array><dict><key>mcx_preference_settings</key><dict><key>AllowNetworkSelection</key><true/><key>CreateJamfConnectPassword</key><true/><key>CreateNewUserHide</key><false/><key>EnableFDE</key><false/><key>LocalFallback</key><true/><key>LoginLogo</key><string>/usr/local/jamfconnect/scs_logo.png</string><key>Migrate</key><true/><key>OIDCClientID</key><string>d6248be3-a81c-4a12-b8b3-ca959a44ae66</string><key>OIDCNewPassword</key><false/><key>OIDCProvider</key><string>Azure</string><key>OIDCROPGID</key><string>d6248be3-a81c-4a12-b8b3-ca959a44ae66</string><key>OIDCRedirectURI</key><string>https://127.0.0.1/jamfconnect</string><key>OIDCTenant</key><string>ef6f731e-41f8-43bd-9df6-8982a75c2f24</string><key>OIDCUsePassthroughAuth</key><true/><key>DenyLocalExcluded</key><array><string>saks</string><string>hbcaccnt0</string></array><key>MigrateUsersHide</key><array><string>saks</string></array></dict></dict></array></dict></dict></dict></array></dict></plist>
